# MLLogisticRegressionClassifier.ModelParameters.ValidationData.split(strategy:)

**Case**

Generate validation data by splitting the training dataset. This is the default.

## Declaration

```swift
case split(strategy: MLSplitStrategy)
```

## Specifying validation data

- **MLLogisticRegressionClassifier.ModelParameters.ValidationData.table(_:)**: Set validation data from the MLDataTable provided.
- **MLLogisticRegressionClassifier.ModelParameters.ValidationData.dataFrame(_:)**: Validation data provided in a DataFrame.
- **MLLogisticRegressionClassifier.ModelParameters.ValidationData.none**: Do not set validation data.
